message:
Migrate E2E tests to PhaseTracker, centralize run_logged_test, remove fake-binary allowlist

E2E test migration (e2e_index_tui, e2e_install_easy, e2e_sources):
- Replace duplicated run_logged_test/logged_test! boilerplate with
  tracker_for() helper using shared PhaseTracker from tests/util/e2e_log
- Restructure tests with explicit tracker.start()/end()/complete() phase
  boundaries and E2ePerformanceMetrics emission for duration tracking
- e2e_install_easy: switch from fake rustc/cargo binaries to real system
  toolchain, simplifying test setup and removing mock allowlist entries

tests/util/e2e_log.rs:
- Add centralized run_logged_test() function and logged_test! macro so
  any test files still needing the old pattern can import from one place
- Add PhaseTracker unit tests: initialization, phase lifecycle, manual
  timing, nested phases, complete/drop idempotency, fail(), metrics()

test-results/no_mock_allowlist.json:
- Remove fake_bin and mock_allowlist entries for e2e_install_easy.rs
  (no longer uses fake binaries)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,24 +105,6 @@
       "permanent": true,
       "note": "This is product functionality, not test infrastructure"
     },

-      "path": "tests/e2e_install_easy.rs",
-      "pattern": "fake_bin",
-      "rationale": "PERMANENT: Fast local test for install.sh script logic. Real install verification runs in CI via .github/workflows/install-test.yml with actual Rust tooling",
-      "owner": "infra-team",
-      "review_date": "2026-07-26",
-      "permanent": true,
-      "note": "Fake rustc/cargo/sha256sum binaries allow fast isolated testing of install script logic. Full real-world install testing runs in CI workflow install-test.yml on Linux and macOS"
-    },
-    {
-      "path": "tests/e2e_install_easy.rs",
-      "pattern": "mock_allowlist",
-      "rationale": "Documentation comment referencing no_mock_allowlist.json filename (false positive)",
-      "owner": "infra-team",
-      "review_date": "2026-07-26",
-      "permanent": true,
-      "note": "Comment references the allowlist file, not mock code"
-    },
     {
       "path": "src/sources/install.rs",
       "pattern": "mock_system_info",
